title:
Data In.
        Direction Out.
text:
Antara Sudhir · MS in Applied Business Analytics
      
        Data In.
        Direction Out.
      
      
        Applied Business Analytics student with hands-on experience across the full analytics pipeline.
        Experienced in transforming raw, complex data into insights that actually drive business
        decisions - not just reports that get filed away.
      
      
        View Experience
      
        
           Download Resume
        

        Get in Touch
      
    
  

  
    
      About Me
      
        I work at the intersection of data engineering and analytics - building pipelines that run reliably and dashboards that stakeholders actually trust.
        Over the past two years, I've built production systems in Microsoft Fabric: Medallion architectures, automated ETL with Python and SQL, and
        Power BI reporting that non-technical teams can act on without questioning the numbers.
      
      
        At iLink Digital, I delivered end-to-end client solutions across the full data lifecycle - migrating 40+ SQL Server objects into Fabric,
        translating business requirements into technical specs, and keeping every deliverable on schedule.
      
      
        I'm now pursuing an M.S. in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University, where I'm focused on one thing: making technical depth
        legible to the people who need to act on it.
      
    
  

  
    
      Experience
      
        
          
          
            Apr 2025 — Nov 2025
            Software Engineer
            iLink Digital
            
              Recreated 40+ SQL Server stored procedures and scalar functions in Microsoft Fabric Warehouse, cutting migration time from 5+ weeks to 2 weeks.
              Migrated and consolidated 80+ data sources into structured, reporting-ready tables within Microsoft Fabric.
              Implemented a 3 layer Medallion architecture enabling delivery of 40+ client-facing reports with improved data quality.
              Partnered with clients and 2 cross-functional teams to gather requirements and deliver accurate reporting solutions.
            
          
        
        
          
          
            Feb 2024 — Mar 2025
            Software Engineer Trainee
            iLink Digital
            
              Recognized with the iLink Digital Award - Rising Star for delivering high-quality data solutions.
              Migrated and consolidated 60+ data sources into structured, reporting-ready tables within Microsoft Fabric.
              Implemented a 3-layer Medallion architecture supporting delivery of 40+ reports in Phase 1 and 60+ in Phase 2.
              Designed and automated a quarterly data collection pipeline generating 90+ Excel templates annually across 7 business units.
            
          
        
        
          
          
            Oct 2023 — Jan 2024
            Data Intern
            iLink Digital
            
              Supported 3 senior analysts with data preparation, validation, and execution of data analysis workflows.
              Independently designed wireframes in Figma and developed 2 client-ready dashboards in Microsoft Fabric.
              Applied Databricks, Python, SQL, Azure, Snowflake, Microsoft Fabric and Power BI across real-world analytics projects.
            
          
        
      
    
  

  
    
      Education
      
        
          
            In progress
            Jan 2026 — May 2028
          
          Boston University
          Master of Science, Applied Business Analytics
          Graduate study focused on analytics, machine learning and data-driven decision making in business contexts.
        
        
          
            Completed
            Aug 2020 — Jul 2023
          
          University of London · Singapore Institute of Management
          Bachelor of Science (Honors), Economics and Management

              Winner — 12th ABA@BU Hackathon · Boston University
              Mar 2026
            
            
              Rising Star Award · iLink Digital
              Aug 2025
            
          
        
      
    
  

  
    
      Projects
      
        
          
            Hackathon · Winner
          
          ABA@BU — Intertemporal choice & subscription strategy
          Built a reproducible analytics pipeline on a large-scale intertemporal-choice dataset (800k+ trials), with EDA, feature engineering, and predictive models (logistic regression, random forest, XGBoost). Tied findings to subscription-tier pricing and presented live per the hackathon brief.
          
            GitHub repository
            Project site
          
        
        
          
            Python Visualizations
          
          Sports League Database Analysis
          Built a shared 4-function ETL pipeline connecting to a cloud-hosted SQLite database and produced 7 interactive Plotly visualizations exploring what drives team success. Deployed as a live Streamlit app.
          
            GitHub repository
          
        
        
          
            Machine Learning
          
          Customer Churn Prediction
          Built a logistic regression model achieving 0.88 precision on churn prediction and AUC-ROC of 0.766. Designed the full ETL pipeline and surfaced actionable retention insights.
          
            GitHub repository

      Contact
